title: Hierarchical predictive coding in distributed pain circuits.

assets.abstract: Predictive coding is a computational theory on describing how the brain perceives and acts, which has been widely adopted in sensory processing and motor control. Nociceptive and pain processing involves a large and distributed network of circuits. However, it is still unknown whether this distributed network is completely decentralized or requires networkwide coordination. phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.
